glosses.vi: sự nhầm lẫn; sự hoang mang

sentences.target: Il y a une confusion avec les billets.
sentences.reading: /il ja yn kɔ̃.fy.zjɔ̃ avɛk le bijɛ/

translations.fr: Il y a une confusion avec les billets.
translations.ipa: /il ja yn kɔ̃.fy.zjɔ̃ avɛk le bijɛ/
translations.en: There's a mix-up with the tickets.
translations.es: Hay una confusión con las entradas.
translations.de: Es gibt eine Verwechslung mit den Karten.
translations.it: C'è un equivoco con i biglietti.
translations.pt: Há uma confusão com os ingressos.
translations.vi: Có sự nhầm lẫn với vé.
translations.nl: Er is een verwarring met de kaartjes.
translations.hi: टिकटों में गड़बड़ी हो गई है.
translations.nb: Det har oppstått en forveksling med billettene.
translations.sv: Det har blivit en förväxling med biljetterna.
translations.da: Der er sket en forveksling med billetterne.
translations.ja: チケットに取り違えがありました。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun serving as an expletive in the existential construction il y a; syntactic subject of the verb.
Clitic adverbial pronoun meaning ‘there’; part of the fixed existential expression il y a.
Main verb (3rd person singular present) in the existential phrase il y a, indicating existence.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun confusion.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the noun phrase indicating the state of confusion.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase avec les billets, marking association/context.
Definite article, plural; determiner of billets, making the noun specific.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition avec.

sentences.target: Désolé pour la confusion ce matin.

translations.fr: Désolé pour la confusion ce matin.
translations.en: Sorry about the confusion this morning.
translations.es: Perdón por la confusión de esta mañana.
translations.de: Entschuldigung für die Verwirrung heute Morgen.
translations.it: Scusa per la confusione di stamattina.
translations.yue: 唔好意思今朝有啲混亂。
translations.tr: Bu sabahki karışıklık için özür dilerim.
translations.vi: Xin lỗi về sự nhầm lẫn sáng nay.
translations.nl: Sorry voor de verwarring van vanochtend.
translations.hi: आज सुबह की उलझन के लिए माफ़ कीजिए.
translations.el: Συγγνώμη για τη σύγχυση σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.ro: Scuze pentru confuzia de azi dimineață.
translations.cs: Omlouvám se za zmatek dnes ráno.
translations.ja: 今朝の混乱についてすみません。

tokens.explanation: Adjective, masculine singular; used elliptically to express apology (understood ‘Je suis désolé’).
Preposition introducing the cause/reason complement pour la confusion.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of confusion.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition pour.
Demonstrative determiner modifying matin to locate the time (‘this morning’).
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal modifier headed by the determiner ce.

sentences.target: On règle cette confusion tout de suite.

translations.fr: On règle cette confusion tout de suite.
translations.en: We'll sort out this mix-up right away.
translations.es: Vamos a solucionar esta confusión ahora mismo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们马上处理好这个差错。
translations.yue: 我哋即刻搞掂呢單烏龍。
translations.ru: Мы сейчас же разберёмся с этой путаницей.
translations.pt: Vamos resolver esta confusão agora mesmo.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ giải quyết sự nhầm lẫn này ngay lập tức.
translations.nl: We lossen deze verwarring meteen op.
translations.uk: Ми зараз же владнаємо цю плутанину.
translations.hi: हम इस गड़बड़ी को तुरंत सुलझा देंगे.
translations.el: Θα λύσουμε αυτή τη σύγχυση αμέσως.
translations.nb: Vi ordner opp i denne forvirringen med en gang.
translations.id: Kami akan segera menyelesaikan kebingungan ini.
translations.sv: Vi löser den här förväxlingen direkt.
translations.da: Vi löser denne forveksling med det samme.
translations.ja: この取り違えはすぐに対処します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun functioning as the subject; often used colloquially for ‘we’.
Main verb (present indicative, 1st/3rd singular form) meaning to resolve; predicates the action.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; specifies the noun confusion.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of règle.
Adverb intensifier in the idiomatic adverbial phrase tout de suite (‘right away’).
Preposition within the fixed expression tout de suite.
Noun used in the set phrase tout de suite; together forms an adverbial meaning ‘immediately’.

sentences.target: Évite la confusion entre ces deux boîtes.
sentences.reading: /e.vit la kɔ̃.fy.zjɔ̃ ɑ̃tʁə se dø bwat/

translations.fr: Évite la confusion entre ces deux boîtes.
translations.ipa: /e.vit la kɔ̃.fy.zjɔ̃ ɑ̃tʁə se dø bwat/
translations.en: Avoid confusion between these two boxes.
translations.es: Evita la confusión entre estas dos cajas.
translations.de: Vermeide die Verwechslung zwischen diesen beiden Schachteln.
translations.it: Evita la confusione tra queste due scatole.
translations.ko: 이 두 상자 사이에 혼선을 피하세요.
translations.zh-Hans: 避免把这两个盒子混淆。
translations.pt: Evite confusão entre estas duas caixas.
translations.he: הימנע מבלבול בין שתי הקופסאות האלה.
translations.vi: Tránh nhầm lẫn giữa hai chiếc hộp này.
translations.nl: Voorkom verwarring tussen deze twee dozen.
translations.uk: Уникай плутанини між цими двома коробками.
translations.hu: Ne keverd össze ezt a két dobozt.
translations.hi: इन दो डिब्बों के बीच भ्रम से बचें.
translations.el: Απέφυγε τη σύγχυση μεταξύ αυτών των δύο κουτιών.
translations.nb: Unngå forveksling mellom disse to boksene.
translations.id: Hindari kebingungan antara dua kotak ini.
translations.sv: Undvik förväxling mellan dessa δύο lådor.
translations.ro: Evită confuzia între aceste două cutii.
translations.cs: Vyhni se záměně těchto dvou krabic.
translations.da: Undgå forveksling mellem disse to kasser.
translations.fi: Vältä sekaannusta näiden kahden laatikon välillä.
translations.ja: この二つの箱を混同しないでください。

tokens.explanation: Main verb in the imperative (2nd person singular), issuing a direct command.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of confusion.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of Évite.
Preposition introducing the complement expressing the entities involved (‘between’).
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies boîtes.
Cardinal numeral specifying quantity; modifier of boîtes.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition entre.
